title: spathelia cubensis
intro: Spathelia cubensis, also known as Cuban goldthread, is a perennial plant native to Cuba and parts of Central America. It is a member of the Rutaceae family and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Spathelia cubensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
